elements.title: Ditrichites
elements.contents: ... that it was 41 years between the first Ditrichites moss description and the genus being reported in amber fossils (pictured)?

elements.title: Adan Diggs
elements.contents: ... that basketball player Adan Diggs hired an agent before making his high school debut?

elements.title: the city's former U.S. Marine Hospital
elements.contents: ... that Johns Hopkins University and the City of Baltimore agreed to demolish the city's former U.S. Marine Hospital in 1987, and then changed their minds in 2019?

elements.title: Battle of Faventia
elements.contents: ... that in the Battle of Faventia, the Byzantines missed the opportunity to attack the Gothic army while crossing a river due to disagreements among their commanders?

elements.title: Cary Brabham
elements.contents: ... that two relatively unknown players, Cary Brabham and Gordon Laro, were featured on the cover of Madden NFL '96?

elements.title: a Tijuana water park
elements.contents: ... that a Tijuana water park features a slide that curves upward to launch riders airborne into a pool?

elements.title: Mutapa Empire
elements.contents: ... that the Mutapa Empire fragmented following the death of a ruler who spent his time writing songs on an mbira and smoking dagga?

elements.title: Israel D. Andrews
elements.contents: ... that Israel D. Andrews believed that promoting trade with the provinces of British North America would eventually lead to U.S. annexation?

elements.title: Clyde Rimple
elements.contents: ... that Olympic cyclist Clyde Rimple was fined £60 for pouring bleach and urinating on his wife's clothes?
